items.claim: Max Holloway has accumulated enough cage time to negatively impact his durability.
items.quote: You have fought almost 9 hours in the cage and now you've been dropped. You got knocked out against Ilya. You got dropped by a retiring Dustin Poirier. ... eventually that damage takes a toll on you.

items.claim: Max Holloway's chin has declined from its previous level.
items.quote: I do not think Max's chin is where it used to be.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will be significantly stronger than Max Holloway due to his current weight class.
items.quote: the guy is going to be really strong and he's going to be significantly stronger than a 145-pounder Max Holloway who has not gotten an appropriate amount of time to build the weight back up.

items.claim: Max Holloway has not had sufficient time to properly move up to the welterweight division.
items.quote: Max Holloway is a 155-pounder that has ballooned and just put on 15 weights, not the right weight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a limited window of 8 to 10 minutes to finish the fight.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has a 10-minute, dare I say 8-minute window to win this fight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's potential use of performance-enhancing drugs would increase his punching power.
items.quote: if he is on steroids, he's going to hit that much harder.
